title: Sales Representative with Lead Extraction and Company Research
description: A sales voice agent that extracts structured lead information during conversations and performs automated company research. Uses a three-agent architecture with dedicated agents for conversation handling, lead extraction, and company research via web search. Maintains stateful lead accumulation across the conversation.

tools.name: extract_leads
tools.description: Extracts structured lead information from conversation

tools.name: research_company
tools.description: Performs automated company research via web search
